recognitions.message: 🌟 Sarah absolutely crushed the API performance challenge this sprint! Reduced response times by 37% — a massive win for our users. Your dedication to quality is truly inspiring. The team is so lucky to have you! 🚀
Vikram went out of his way to help me debug a complex CSS animation issue at 6pm. Stayed back without being asked. This is what great teamwork looks like! Thank you Vikram 🙏
Michael's leadership during the infrastructure migration was exceptional. Clear communication, quick decisions, and always keeping the team calm under pressure. Best manager I've had! 💪
Lisa redesigned the onboarding flow and reduced drop-off by 42%! Her user research was thorough and the designs are absolutely stunning. Innovation at its finest! ✨

announcements.title: Company Town Hall — August 12th
announcements.content:
Rahul Verma (Operations) · 30 July 2026

You're invited to our Company Town Hall on August 12th at 4:00 PM IST / 6:30 AM EST. During the session, we'll review key business achievements from the past quarter, share strategic priorities for the months ahead, introduce new team initiatives, and recognize outstanding employee contributions. A live Q&A session will follow the presentation. Attendance is required for all employees. Meeting details and access links will be distributed via email 48 hours before the event.

announcements.title: 🎉 Q2 All-Hands Meeting — July 5th
announcements.content: Join us for our Q2 All-Hands on July 5th at 3:00 PM IST / 5:30 AM EST. We'll cover Q2 performance highlights, product roadmap for Q3, upcoming engineering initiatives, and a special surprise announcement. Attendance is mandatory for all team members. Zoom link will be shared 24 hours prior via calendar invite.

announcements.title: 📋 Updated Work From Home Policy — Effective July 1
announcements.content: Effective July 1, 2026, the WFH policy is updated to allow up to 3 days per week for all eligible roles (Grade 3 and above). Employees must maintain minimum 40% in-office attendance per month. Please acknowledge this policy update before June 30th. New WFH request process: Submit via WorkFlow → Leave Management → WFH Request. Questions? Contact HR at hr@workflow.com.

announcements.title: 🏆 Engineering Team — Quarterly Awards!
announcements.content: Congratulations to our Q2 winners! 🥇 Most Innovative: Sarah Johnson for the API performance optimization initiative. 🥈 Team Player of the Quarter: Vikram Nair for exceptional cross-team collaboration. 🥉 Rising Star: Lisa Park for transforming our design system. Awards ceremony will be held during the Q2 All-Hands. Gift vouchers will be distributed by July 10th.

announcements.title: 🔧 System Maintenance — June 28, 2:00–4:00 AM IST
announcements.content: WorkFlow platform will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on June 28th from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM IST (June 27, 8:30 PM to 10:30 PM UTC). During this window, attendance clock-in/out, leave applications, and payslip downloads will be unavailable. Please plan accordingly and clock out before 1:55 AM IST if you're on a night shift.

announcements.title: 💡 New Learning Path: Cloud Architecture
announcements.content: We've partnered with A Cloud Guru to provide free access to the Cloud Architecture learning path for all Engineering and DevOps team members. Complete the path by August 31st to receive AWS Solutions Architect certification vouchers. Access via Training → Learning Paths → Cloud Architecture. Limited seats available — first come, first served!

welcomeMessages.message: Alex, welcome to WorkFlow! You're joining at an incredibly exciting time. We're building the future of work, and your skills are going to be a huge part of that journey. We're thrilled to have you!

Welcome to the team, Alex! We're so excited to have you join us. Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions — we're all here to help you succeed. Looking forward to building great things together! 🚀
Hey Alex! I'll be your onboarding buddy for the next 30 days. I've been where you are and I promise to make this transition as smooth as possible. Let's grab coffee on Day 1! ☕
Welcome aboard! If you ever have HR questions — benefits, policies, anything at all — my inbox is always open. Wishing you a wonderful first day at WorkFlow! 🌟
Hey Alex! The whole engineering team is excited you're here. We standup daily at 10:30 AM and Slack is our hub. Welcome aboard!
